title: LynAI Scorecard (v1.1)
description: Aggregated scorecard produced by agent.aggregator at each cycle. The Aggregator MERGES critic outputs only; gate authority is delegated to agent.gatekeeper (see gate_token.schema.json). Hard gate: every dimension MUST be strictly greater than 9.5 (i.e. ≥ 9.6). See docs/00_DECISIONS.md §D-1.

draft_revision.description: Cycle number this scorecard scores. v0 = initial draft; v1 = first revision; etc.

draft_content_hash.description: SHA-256 of the draft markdown bytes at score time. Gate-Keeper binds tokens to this hash; any post-scoring edit invalidates the gate.

gate_threshold.description: Echoes the threshold rule applied. Operator must verify this matches the locked decision in 00_DECISIONS.md §D-1.

weighted_average.description: Informational only. The gate is per-dimension, never weighted.

blocking_dimensions.description: All dimensions with score <= 9.5 (failing the strict-greater-than rule).

aggregator_recommendation.description: Aggregator NEVER decides — only proposes. Gate-Keeper signs the actual decision in gate_token.schema.json. PROPOSE_DELIVER_WITH_SHORTFALL only valid when cycle == cycle_cap.

anchor_rationale.description: Verbatim from the owning critic. Aggregator MUST NOT rewrite this. Audit trail.

notes_ref.description: Pointer back to the critic JSON line-anchored notes for the Reviser.
